title: Re:メタモルフォーゼ・キャンディーナ
description:
Description: 

＊All girls can transform with candy＊

This is a story about girls who want to transform their current selves and a mysterious candy shop.

A short branching visual novel where the ending you see changes depending on which visually enticing candy you choose to eat.

Features:

• Story and visual effects that recreate psychological horror and trauma based on the creator's personal experiences. 

• The gap between simple art with exaggerated cuteness versus psychedelic effects that use glitchy noise and realistic photographs.

• New to the Steam version: Updated visual effects, new art and story along with logs to explain the world of the game and show the way to the truth.

Streaming Guidelines:

• All of the game can be streamed and/or uploaded in gameplay videos.

• However, please add your own unique element to the stream or video, such as your own comments (e.g., through voice or captions) or editing and rearranging the recording of your own game play. Streaming and/or uploading the gameplay as-is without any additional elements is not allowed.

• Please make sure to include a link to the Steam page in the video and/or the video summary.

• There are no restrictions on streaming/video monetization.

Fan Work Guidelines:

There are no specific restrictions on fan works as long as they would not offend public order and morals.
description_short: All girls can transform with candy. A short branching visual novel about a mysterious candy shop and the girls who go there. What candy will you choose?
